The '''Battle of Eredenn''' occurred when [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] arrived at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Hunt for the Decimator]] after learning of the weapon's existence from [[Boorka]] the Hutt.

==The battle==
[[File:Eredenn_Base.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] base installed on [[Eredenn Prime]].]]

At [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] command, Tann's army quickly exterminated the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there and captured the [[Facet Test Site|research]] facilities that were working on the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimators]]. [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] reinforcements of the [[Eredenn Prime]] army arrived too late to save the clones and half their forces fell to the CIS. Nevertheless, their diversion allowed clone troopers to escape to [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] with the operational codes for the Decimators.

[[File:Eredenn_base_destroyed.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The Eredenn base is destroyed.]]

==Aftermath==
She retrieved the machines and took a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that had data on the Decimator. [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] had thus gotten one step closer to having the Decimator under her control.

[[File:Decimators_stolen.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Decimators are stolen by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]].]]
